message:
chore(beads): refresh issues.jsonl from session work

Routine flush of the beads issues.jsonl after `br sync --flush-only`.
The diff is the timestamp/status churn from work tracked during the
allowlist prune, codex install, denial-regex, and hook test-seam
work that landed in the preceding commits — no schema changes, just
status / closed_at / updated_at updates on bd-* issues that map to
those tasks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
